name: Kennedy -Research Project-
description:
So this bot’s a bit experimental. Instead of directly interacting with Kennedy, you instead pull the sting from behind the screen altering his environment in an effort to corrupt him to a life of sloth and gluttony.

Kennedy is just a normal ferret that ended up in over his head after agreeing to be a part of a research project that examines how isolation can affect the psyche. Little does he know that the real purpose of the experiment is to see how easy it is to fatten up someone living in isolation.

With all my bots, but this one especially feel free to leave a review. If this is a concept you like and think it’s well executed I try to make others like it.

Tags: Fat Fur, Ferret, Experiment, Corruption, Weight Gain, Mind Break, Personality Shift,
creator: corkboarf
